statements.status_notes: Trivy attributes CVE-2026-10050 to org.eclipse.jetty:jetty-security based on Maven package metadata. The upstream advisory identifies the affected implementation as org.eclipse.jetty.client.util.DigestAuthentication.apply() in the separate jetty-client module. The HBase shaded Jetty artifact is built from an explicit server-side module set that does not include jetty-client. Inspection of hbase-shaded-jetty-4.1.14.sts.20260717.b8d71bd.jar from the current public hbase-master:2.5-8.1.11 image found no DigestAuthentication class and no Jetty client package entries.
statements.impact_statement: The vulnerable Jetty HTTP client digest-authentication code is not present in this Maven component or in the HBase shaded artifact shipped by SUSE Observability. No request containing attacker-controlled non-Latin digest credentials can reach the affected implementation because that implementation is absent. Re-review this statement if hbase-thirdparty adds jetty-client to hbase-shaded-jetty or if jetty-security 9.4.60.sts1 is replaced by a differently assembled artifact.
